---
title: "combine_new_batch"
author: "Ruwen Zhou"
date: "8/12/2024"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(readr)
library(plyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(phyloseq)
library(vegan)
library(DESeq2)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
```

```{r}
helios_core_old = read_excel("data/HELIOS_Core_redacted.xlsx")
helios_core_new = read.csv("data/HELIOS2_Core_redacted_300.csv")
helios_core_new$FREG5_Ethnic_Group <- ifelse(helios_core_new$FREG5_Race == "CHINESE", "C",
                                             ifelse(helios_core_new$FREG5_Race == "INDIAN", "I",
                                             ifelse(helios_core_new$FREG5_Race == "MALAY", "M",
                                             ifelse(helios_core_new$FREG5_Race == "Other", "O", NA))))


helios_core_old[,c("FREG0_PID", "FREG1_Barcode", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group")]
helios_core_new[,c("FREG0_PID", "FREG1_Barcode", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group")]

```
```{r}
library(writexl)
helios800 = rbind(helios_core_new[,c("FREG0_PID", "FREG1_Barcode", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group")], helios_core_old[,c("FREG0_PID", "FREG1_Barcode", "FREG5_Ethnic_Group")])
helios800
write_xlsx(helios800, "data/helios800.xlsx")
```
